build_recipe:
STEP 1: Create base plate — cq.Workplane("XY").box(60, 40, 25)

STEP 2: Cut center bore — .faces(">Z").workplane().circle(8).cutThruAll()

STEP 3: Add raised feature — .workplane(offset=25).rect(54, 36).extrude(1.5)

STEP 4: Chamfer top edges — .edges("|Z").chamfer(0.5)

STEP 5: Create vertical walls — .faces(">X").workplane().moveTo(3, 20).circle(12).cutThruAll()

STEP 6: Add fillets to vertical edges — .edges("|Y").fillet(3)
